closure_match_direction_label: {marble_chain_rule_text} Which labeled arrow removes marbles and leaves two same-color marbles touching after the chain closes?
{marble_chain_rule_text} Choose the arrow letter whose pop makes the closing chain connect two marbles of the same color.
{marble_chain_rule_text} Among the labeled shot arrows, which one pops marbles and leaves a same-color pair at the closure gap?
{marble_chain_rule_text} Report the shot-arrow label that creates a same-color match when the popped gap closes.
{marble_chain_rule_text} Which arrow removes an existing run and causes the two boundary marbles to touch with matching colors?
max_pop_direction_label: {marble_chain_rule_text} Which labeled arrow removes the most existing chain marbles?
{marble_chain_rule_text} Choose the arrow letter that makes the largest number of existing marbles pop.
{marble_chain_rule_text} Among the labeled shot arrows, which shot pops the most existing marbles?
{marble_chain_rule_text} Report the label of the shot arrow with the largest pop count.
{marble_chain_rule_text} Which labeled arrow gives the maximum number of existing marbles removed?
pop_count_after_marked_shot: {marble_chain_rule_text} Following the marked shot arrow, how many existing chain marbles are removed?
{marble_chain_rule_text} Count the existing marbles that pop after the shown marked shot.
{marble_chain_rule_text} What is the pop count for existing chain marbles along the marked arrow?
{marble_chain_rule_text} After the marked shot, how many existing chain marbles are removed?
{marble_chain_rule_text} Determine the number of existing chain marbles that pop from the marked shot.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_marble_chain_board: a Zuma-like marble-chain board with a central shooter, a colored shooter marble, arrow shot options, and colored marbles on a curved track
code_prompt_defaults.marble_chain_rule_text: Fire the shooter marble straight along the chosen arrow. It inserts at the chain gap indicated by that arrow. If the inserted marble's same-color contiguous run has at least three marbles, the existing marbles in that run are removed and the chain closes once. Do not apply any later cascade.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_closure_match_direction_: set "annotation" to one pixel-space point [x, y] at the insertion gap indicated by the selected arrow
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_closure_match_direction_labe: set "answer" to only the selected shot-arrow letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_max_pop_direction_label: set "annotation" to one pixel-space point [x, y] at the insertion gap indicated by the selected arrow
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_max_pop_direction_label: set "answer" to only the selected shot-arrow letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_pop_count_after_marked_s: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for each existing chain marble that would pop; use an empty array if none pop
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_pop_count_after_marked_shot: set "answer" to the number of existing chain marbles removed by the marked shot, excluding the shooter marble
